articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

article.headline: Germany kick off Euro 2024 rebuild with 2-0 win over Peru
article.description: Germany forward Niclas Fullkrug scored twice to secure a 2-0 victory over Peru in a friendly on Saturday as the hosts launched their mission to reb
article.linkText: Germany begin Euros rebuild with win over Peru

images.name: Germany celeb vs. Peru_20230325 [1296x729]
images.alt: Niclas Fuellkrug of Germany celebrates after scoring his team's second goal during an international friendly match between Germany and Peru at MEWA Arena on March 25, 2023 in Mainz, Germany.
images.credit: Harry Langer/DeFodi Images via Getty Images

article.story:
Germany forward Niclas Fullkrug scored twice to secure a 2-0 victory over Peru in a friendly on Saturday as the hosts launched their mission to rebuild a competitive team for next year's Euros on home soil.

In their first match since crashing out of last year's World Cup in the first round, the Germans unusually deployed two strikers with Fullkrug and Timo Werner and were sharp in attack, especially in a strong first half.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

They did, however, look uncertain at times with the ball in their own half, repeatedly losing possession and struggling with Peru's high pressing.

"You could see that the team had dynamism, especially in attack. A lot of things were good today, maybe not at 100%," said Germany coach Hansi Flick.

"Sometimes the last pass was not clean enough. We had times where we lost possession. We have to be more careful."

"But we also kept a clean sheet which was very important for us and had worked on it."

The 30-year-old Fullkrug opened his account in the 12th minute, turning in the ball after Kai Havertz had played it on with his chest. He had also scored their last World Cup group stage goal.

Peru goalkeeper Pedro Gallese pulled off a stunning double save a little later by stopping Florian Wirtz's shot and then denying Werner on the rebound.

But Werder Bremen forward Fullkrug, who made his Germany debut just days before the World Cup, bagged his fifth goal in his fifth international, flicking in a superb cross from newcomer Marius Wolf in the 33rd.

"It was all about having a good start to the year and excite the fans," Fullkrug said. "I think we did it well in the first half. Then it got a bit wild in the second half."

Substitute Serge Gnabry rattled the crossbar with a thundering mid-air volley on the hour before Havertz sent a 68th minute penalty onto the post with the Germans having taken much of the pace out of the game.

Germany next play Belgium on March 28 in Cologne.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Germany 1, Peru 0. Niclas Füllkrug (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Kai Havertz.
Goal!  Germany 2, Peru 0. Niclas Füllkrug (Germany) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marius Wolf with a cross.
Substitution, Peru. Gianluca Lapadula replaces Raúl Ruidíaz.
Substitution, Peru. Édison Flores replaces Christofer Gonzáles.
Substitution, Germany. Serge Gnabry replaces Timo Werner.
Substitution, Germany. Mario Götze replaces Florian Wirtz.
Substitution, Germany. Leon Goretzka replaces Emre Can.
Wilder Cartagena (Peru) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Peru. Andy Polo replaces Wilder Cartagena.

Substitution, Germany. Thilo Kehrer replaces Nico Schlotterbeck because of an injury.
Substitution, Peru. Carlos Zambrano replaces Luis Advíncula.
Substitution, Peru. Ray Sandoval replaces André Carrillo.
David Raum (Germany) is shown the yellow card.
